commit.message:
Move silhouette/glow to outer container, anchor tower to bottom

- SVG silhouette and radial glow now position relative to full
  container (centered on screen) instead of the rows div
- justify-end pb-8: tower grows upward from the bottom
- Dynamic --rise-dist per row for foundation-up animation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Anchor tower to bottom so words build up from foundation

justify-end pb-8: single word sits at screen bottom, subsequent
words stack upward — visually builds from the ground up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Dynamic rise distance: each row rises from proportional depth below base

Bottom row rises 40px, top row rises (N-1)*50+40px — words physically
travel from the foundation level up to their final position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase towerRowIn translateY for more dramatic rise from base

60px travel distance makes each row visibly rise up from below
instead of barely-noticeable 20px nudge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix word placement to build tower from base

Iterate placement loop bottom→top so base rows (wide, appear first in
animation) win ties over observation deck rows. Big/prominent words now
land at the foundation and visibly appear first as the tower builds up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make tower build animation visibly bottom-to-top

Increase row stagger from 40ms to 100ms and reduce per-row duration
from 500ms to 400ms, making the cascading bottom-to-top build effect
clearly perceivable (~1.1s total for 8 rows).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Extend profanity filter with anatomical and explicit terms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: publicIdentifier + title_text — tested and verified (#2, #3)

Issue #2 — publicIdentifier resolution:
- Previous: salesApiProfiles decoration=(publicIdentifier) → field not
  available in Sales Nav API model, always empty.
- Fix: Use Voyager HTTP /identity/dash/profiles?q=memberIdentity with the
  member ID directly. Tested: API accepts member IDs (ACwAAA...) as
  memberIdentity and returns publicIdentifier correctly.

Issue #3 — title_text scoped search:
- Previous: keywords:(titleScope:...) nested format → HTTP 500.
- Fix: Use keywordScope:CURRENT_AND_PAST_TITLE as a top-level query
  parameter (same format as Sales Nav UI). When titleText is combined
  with keywords, both are merged into keywords without scope restriction.

Tested manually:
- Voyager accepts member ID as memberIdentity → returns publicIdentifier ✓
- title_text with geography returns 2165 results (vs 5 with typeahead) ✓

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add completed task section to Today/Week/Month views

Completed recurring tasks now remain visible in a dimmed "Completed"
section at the bottom of the relevant tab until the end of the day,
preventing re-completion and signalling done status.

- Add lastCompletedAt Date attribute to Task Core Data entity
- Add wasCompletedToday computed property in Task+Extensions
- TaskStore sets lastCompletedAt on completion, excludes wasCompletedToday
  tasks from active lists, and populates todayCompletedTasks /
  weeklyCompletedTasks / monthlyCompletedTasks arrays
- TaskRowView gains isCompleted param: filled checkmark, disabled button,
  45% opacity
- TaskListView gains completedTasks param with collapsible Completed section
- Today/ThisWeek/ThisMonth views pass their respective completed arrays

- Q9b (projectCopyTool.test.ts): copy-level loadNow integration test verifying
  orderFilesForPush is wired through the copy pipeline
- Q1 regression test: require re-pinned when remote position has drifted

205 tests pass, 0 TypeScript errors.

Fix broadcast_job_update UnboundLocalError on _clients set

The -= augmented assignment caused Python to treat _clients as a local
variable. Use difference_update() instead for proper global set mutation.

NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL must be available during npm run build via ARG.

commit.message:
Fix M-LEGO components showing native script instead of romanized text

The component-type phrases already had target_text_roman populated, but
generateLearningScript was using target_text directly. All other phrase
types already used the target_text_roman || target_text fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: pre-resolve proxy DNS with node:dns/promises for Alpine compatibility

undici ProxyAgent does internal DNS that fails in Alpine Docker (ENOTFOUND).
Pre-resolve proxy hostname with Node's dns.lookup (works on Alpine musl)
and use IP address in ProxyAgent URL. Includes 5-min DNS cache.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix batch schedule: use clinic user ID for DB records when admin schedules

Root cause: admin user (Clerk-only) ID doesn't exist in auth.users table.
The scheduled_discharge_calls and scheduled_discharge_emails tables have
FK constraints on user_id → auth.users(id). When admin schedules on behalf
of a clinic via clinicSlug, use the clinic's own user ID for DB record
ownership instead of the admin's user ID.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: harden metrics Lambda with rate limiting, input validation, and resilient health endpoint

Add in-memory rate limiter (200 vitals/min, 100 CSP/min) to prevent cost-flooding
on unauthenticated endpoints. Validate vitals values (finite, 0-60000 range). Tighten
CSP URI regex to full-match. Wrap vitals JSON.parse in try/catch. Replace Promise.all
with Promise.allSettled in health endpoint for partial failure resilience. Add lazy
health fetch (only polls when admin panel is expanded).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: redefine product vision and clean up stale docs/branches

VISION.md を全面書き直し: 位置情報→活動量判定の単機能アプリから、
スマホで生活リズムを監視しLLMが「お母さん」として介入する見守り

Implement Steps 1-3 of the Rust migration plan:
- Step 1: Project init with clap CLI, SQLite (rusqlite bundled), location schema
- Step 2: collect subcommand — termux-location parsing → DB insert (mock support via OKAASAN_FORCE_LOCATION_JSON)

Includes 24 tests (12 unit + 12 integration) covering DB CRUD, Haversine precision, collect flow, and judge output validation.

Also updates VISION.md with habit management model (stable/disrupted/adapting).

- Remove google-sheets from docs/docs.json navigation

Closes #49

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: design habit_state judgment logic with multi-expert analysis

Design the core habit_state (stable/disrupted/adapting) transition
logic for Issue #50, synthesizing insights from behavioral psychology,
data science, behavior design, and circadian science.

Key decisions:
- 3 consecutive miss days triggers stable→disrupted (Kaushal & Rhodes 2015)
- 7+ days disrupted without recovery → adapting
- 14 consecutive achievements or 80% over 21 days → stable
- Direct recovery path: disrupted→stable in <7 days with 3 consecutive achievements
- Data-insufficient days (event_count<10) excluded from judgment
- 14-day cold start observation period for new users

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add ADRs, design docs, and references for habit_state system

Add 6 ADRs (rule-based-over-ml, four-state-model, intervention-decoupled,
insufficient-data-excluded, consecutive-counter-gap, hybrid-llm-rule),
4 design docs (implementation, db-migration, test-strategy,
conversation-feedback), and 3 reference docs (habit-profile, archive,
mermaid-style). Update frontmatter and docs.json registry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: implement habit_state judgment system (#53-#58)

Add 4-state habit tracking (Init/Stable/Disrupted/Adapting) with:
- Type definitions, config constants, DB schema with CHECK constraints
- Daily classification (Achievement/Miss/InsufficientData) based on GPS events
- 6 state transition rules in a pure-function state machine
- 5-level intervention system decoupled from state transitions
- Context builder with JST date handling and 7-day gap detection
- Integration into judge subcommand with graceful degradation
- 42 new tests (unit + integration), all 97 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Delete legacy shell scripts (replaced by Rust binary)

commit.message:
feat: upstream sync — push changes back to source helpdesk platforms

Add outbox-based upstream sync engine that pushes ticket updates, replies,
notes, and new tickets back to their originating platform (Zendesk, Freshdesk,
Groove, HelpCrunch, Intercom, Help Scout, Zoho Desk, HubSpot).

commit.message:
experiment: add improved Phase 1 outline experiment

Stratified sampling (30 evenly-spaced snippets, position-labeled) with
structured prompt (DRAMATIS PERSONAE, NARRATIVE STRUCTURE, PLOT OUTLINE,
THEMATIC TENSIONS). Optional --two-pass FAISS gap-filling for complex novels.

Phase 2 and Phase 3 identical to production semantic_map_reduce.py.
Uses fixed 150K macro-chunks to isolate the outline variable.

Results: MAE=0.064 (5 books), best method so far. Two-pass on Perdido
further reduces to 0.042 by retrieving thematic resolution passages.

Also adds improved_outline_scores to quality_score.py SCORE_METHODS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Exclude stuck-pending pods (ImagePullBackOff) from node resource accounting

Pods stuck in ImagePullBackOff/ErrImagePull have phase=Pending, so their
requests were counted in CPURequested/MemoryRequested. This inflated node
utilization to ~100% on nodes that are actually nearly idle (e.g., pf97:
99.8% CPU requested but only 11.8% used, with 10 of 16 pods stuck in
ImagePullBackOff consuming 21 cores and 187Gi in dead requests).

The downscaler never selected these nodes for scale-down because they
appeared fully committed. Now stuck-pending pods are excluded from both
resource accounting and drain feasibility placement simulation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add datetime awareness to agent and heartbeat prompts (#415)

The main agent loop had no concept of current date/time, causing
incorrect responses to time-sensitive questions. The heartbeat
evaluator used raw UTC instead of the contractor's local timezone,
and the weekday gate in _is_checklist_item_due checked weekday in
UTC, which could incorrectly skip Friday evening items for
western-timezone contractors.

- Add "Current date" section to build_agent_system_prompt() using
  contractor's timezone (date-only for prompt cache stability)
- Convert heartbeat evaluator's "Current time" from UTC ISO to
  contractor-local datetime with day-of-week
- Fix weekday gate to convert to local timezone before checking
  weekday, preventing false Saturday detection

Fixes #413

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add swipe from left edge to open sidebar on iOS (#249)

* Add UIScreenEdgePanGestureRecognizer to enable swipe from left to open sidebar

The custom touchesMoved approach in MainController wasn't working because
contentView.contentView.isUserInteractionEnabled = true when sidebar is
collapsed, so touch events never reached MainController.

This fix adds a UIScreenEdgePanGestureRecognizer that:
- Detects swipes from the left screen edge
- Only activates when sidebar is collapsed
- Opens sidebar when swipe progress > 50% or velocity > 300pt/s
- Provides visual feedback during swipe via updateLayoutGuide
- Works on iOS (excluded from macCatalyst)

Fixes the issue where swipe from left wasn't opening the sidebar.

* Address code review feedback for swipe-from-left fix

- Add velocity direction check to only process rightward swipes (>= 0)
- Add haptic feedback (UIImpactFeedbackGenerator) when sidebar opens
- Extract velocity to a local variable for reuse

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix edge pan gesture issues found during code review

- Move gesture setup from init() to viewDidLoad() to avoid premature view loading
- Remove double haptic feedback (rely on isSidebarCollapsed didSet)
- Fix competing layout constraints by making reset conditional
- Handle .cancelled and .failed gesture states separately
- Scope shouldRecognizeSimultaneouslyWith to edge pan gestures only
- Clamp leftward drag with max(0, translation.x)
- Move handleEdgePan to MainController+Gesture.swift for private access
- Use implicit return per project convention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: normalize account summary keys to lowercase + add IBKR session docs

CP Gateway REST API returns all-lowercase tag names (netliquidation,
buyingpower, totalcashvalue) but all callers expected CamelCase, causing
account balances to show as zero everywhere.

Fix: normalize to lowercase in gateway.get_account_summary() at parse
time so all callers are consistent. Update cli, daily_report, web router,
and telegram bot accordingly.

Also add docs/IBKR_SESSION.md documenting the two-layer session
architecture, ssodh/init auto-recovery, and manual re-login procedure
(restart ibkr-cpgw.service before browser login).

Also update bin/tickle.sh in ibclientportal to auto-call ssodh/init
when authenticated=false before escalating to manual login alert.
